degradations.message: Promotion planning is policy-conservative; prefer --dry-run in automation.

revalidation: Re-run `ee causal estimate --artifact-id mem_confounded_001 --method replay --json` before applying changes.
narrowerRouting: Narrow routing scope for `mem_confounded_001` to higher-confidence task families.
experimentProposals: Propose controlled experiment for `mem_confounded_001` with `ee learn experiment --artifact-id mem_confounded_001 --dry-run --json`.
